title: onobrychis aucheri subsp. teheranica
intro: Onobrychis aucheri subsp. teheranica, also known as the Onobrychis aucheri Tehran sub-species, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae, commonly found in the Middle East region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Onobrychis aucheri subsp. teheranica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
